title: Auracircuit
description: A modpack for modern minecraft version based around high-tech machinery and magical studies
body:
![Auracircuit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab82aa30679017c25dbbcb7246a0e2e18570b3a4.png)
## About

**Auracircuit** is a modpack for the 1.21.1 Minecraft Fabric version featuring two fresh and extremely interesting mods - Etherology and Oritech.

## Featured mods

- [Etherology](https://modrinth.com/mod/etherology) - magical mod heavily insiped by the Thaumcraft mod series and based around the studies of a new mystical matter called Ether, as well as alchemy and wizardry. Features many fun mechanics, world interactions and even a new biome!
- [Oritech](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech) - new industrial mod with a Satisfactory vibes. Features include new ore and ore processing chains, automated farming and mining, item and fluid transportation systems and powerful endgame items.
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) - everyone's favorite cooking and farming mod that adds many new crops, dishes and decorative blocks.

## Helpful addons

To make the experience with the modpack better, some beloved mods such as [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi), [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port)) and [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) were added and configured to match the modpack's style.

## Visual improvements

**Auracircuit** comes with a bunch of fancy resourcepacks and aestetical mods that make the playthrough even more charming and inspiring, such as [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys), [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [Elytra Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-trims), [Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) and many more!
